zh.Walkeringham, Nottinghamshire, England: 英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾瓦爾可林加姆
zh.lifeSummary: John Williamson De Penlin , Sir於1500年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾。他於1512年與Isabel Thirkeld在英國波藍德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1581年5月29日在蘇格蘭享年81歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可。

zh-hans.Walkeringham, Nottinghamshire, England: 英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾瓦爾可林加姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Williamson De Penlin , Sir于1500年出生在苏格兰度福利爾。他于1512年与Isabel Thirkeld在英国波藍德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1581年5月29日在苏格兰享年81岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: Williamson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northern) and Scottish: from the Middle English personal name William + patronymic -son ‘son of William’. This surname is also found in Northern Ireland (Ulster), especially in Antrim.
Americanized form of Norwegian, Danish, and North German Wilhelmsen , Swedish Wilhelmsson, or Dutch and North German Willemsen , all cognates of 1.

History: This surname was brought to North America from northern England and northern Ireland independently by numerous different bearers from the 17th century onward. Timothy Williamson is recorded in Plymouth Colony in 1643.

variants.name: Willamson
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Williamson  .

variants.name: William
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name William, Willam, Willem, an Old Picard and Norman French form of ancient Germanic Willihelm, composed of the elements wil- ‘will, desire’ + helm- ‘helmet, protection’. This Norman personal name became widely used in England, Scotland and Wales after the Conquest, mainly no doubt in honor of the Conqueror himself. By the 13th century it had already become the most popular personal name in England. A Parisian form of the name Guillaume was also sometimes used (see Gillam ), which in medieval Wales was adopted as Gwilym (see Gwilliam ).
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Guillaume  .

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Penlin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Haim, Iren, Isaak, Meyer, Moisey, Yetta.  Russian Boris, Arkadi, Igor, Mikhail, Yevgeniy.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): metronymic from the Yiddish female personal name Perle (see Perel ) + the Slavic possessive suffix -in.
German: from a pet form of   Bernhard   or a habitational name from a place so named near Schwerin, Mecklenburg.

variants.name: Perel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Aron, Shira, Yitzchok.  Russian Oleg, Yelena, Mikhail, Vladimir, Yuriy.  German Arno, Hannelore.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the Yiddish female personal name Perl ‘pearl’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: John Williamson De Penlin , Sir was born in 1500, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland. He married Isabel Thirkeld in 1512, in Cumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 29 May 1581, in Scotland, at the age of 81, and was buried in Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: John Williamson De Penlin , Sir est né en 1500, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse. Il a épousé Isabel Thirkeld en 1512, à Cumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 29 mai 1581, à Écosse, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: John Williamson De Penlin , Sir wurde 1500 in Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren. Er hat 1512 in Cumberland, England Isabel Thirkeld geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 29. Mai 1581 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Scotland und wurde in Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: John Williamson De Penlin , Sir è nato il nel 1500 nel Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Lui sposato Isabel Thirkeld nel 1512, nel Cumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 29 maggio 1581, nel Scotland, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Williamson De Penlin , Sirは1500年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアで生まれた。1512年にイギリスクウンバーランドでIsabel Thirkeldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1581年5月29日にスコットランドで81歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Williamson De Penlin , Sir(은)는 1500년 스컷랜드 드프리실르에서 태어났다. 그는 1512년 영국 c벌랜드에서 Isabel Thirkeld(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1581년 5월 29일 스컷랜드에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Williamson De Penlin , Sir nasceu em 1500, em Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Ele casou-se com Isabel Thirkeld em 1512, em Cumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 29 de maio de 1581, em Scotland, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: John Williamson De Penlin , Sir родился в 1500 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Thirkeld в 1512 г. в местности кумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 29 мая 1581 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: John Williamson De Penlin , Sir nació en 1500, en Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Se casó con Isabel Thirkeld en 1512, en Cumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 29 de mayo de 1581, en Scotland, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultado en Norfolk, Inglaterra.
